items.title: Architecture Fundamentals
items.description: Core principles of distributed systems architecture including CAP theorem, consistency models, availability, partition tolerance, and key trade-offs every engineer must understand.

items.title: Distributed Systems
items.description: Core distributed systems concepts including consensus algorithms, leader election, vector clocks, distributed transactions, fault tolerance, and the fallacies of distributed computing.

items.title: Kafka: The Complete Guide
items.description: Introductory Kafka guide covering core concepts, brokers, topics, partitions, producers, consumers, and event streaming basics.
